Hua Xu ŤŹĮŤęĚ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hua Xu (ŤŹĮŤęĚ). Killed by Teng Yin. Older son of Hua Rong. Hua Xu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Hua Xu lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
